hero.headline: Global Superstore Intelligence
hero.description: Sales, profit, discount behavior, and regional performance from 51,290 orders turned into a crisp executive analytics story.

sections.title: What the dashboard reveals
sections.description: The analysis connects executive KPIs with category performance, market concentration, and margin pressure from discounts.

takeaways.title: Technology leads revenue and profit.
takeaways.body: It contributes the strongest sales base and $663.78K in profit, making it the clearest growth engine.

takeaways.title: Loss orders need focused attention.
takeaways.body: 12,544 transactions were unprofitable, so discount and shipping decisions deserve tight monitoring.

takeaways.title: Copiers and phones are profit heroes.
takeaways.body: The top two sub-categories generated roughly $475K profit together.

sections.title: Market reach at global scale
sections.description: Asia Pacific and Europe create the largest sales pools, while USCA and LATAM add strong regional depth.

sections.title: Built like an analyst story
sections.description: The project follows a practical path from raw store data to decision-ready visuals and SQL-backed business questions.

steps.title: Clean and model the sales data
steps.body: Orders, products, regions, discounts, shipping costs, and margins are shaped for fast Power BI exploration.

steps.title: Surface category and market signals
steps.body: Visuals emphasize where revenue grows, where profit concentrates, and where discount behavior damages margin.

steps.title: Turn findings into decisions
steps.body: The final report frames actions around high-profit categories, loss-heavy segments, and regional priorities.

recommendedUse: Use this JSON as a content and style blueprint for a website, app screen, or design tool.
Use the existing Project.pbix file for the actual Power BI report.
